name: Switch-Process

options.name: -WithCommand
options.description: Specifies the native executable (and any parameters) to be run. All additional values passed as arguments are passed as an array of strings to be executed with the first command.

args.name: -WithCommand
args.description: Specifies the native executable (and any parameters) to be run. All additional values passed as arguments are passed as an array of strings to be executed with the first command.

description: On Linux and macOS, the cmdlet calls the `execv()` function to provide similar behavior as POSIX shells.
